calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2003 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Feb-10-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reconsider Sanctions;
Off Calendar Dec-08-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Reconsider Sanctions issued on 10/14/2003 to James T. Biesty, Esq., in the amount of $350.00, for failure to appear. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered case to be set for an Order to Show Cause pursuant to CRC 225 Calendar on 2/10/2004 at 10:00 AM in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Loretta Najera. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
